title: The Letter Hidden in a Book
content: While organizing old books in her apartment, Sophie opened a novel she had not read in years. A folded letter slipped onto the floor. It had been written by Lucas shortly after they graduated from university, but somehow she had never seen it. In the letter, he described how much he admired her courage and confessed that he had always hoped they could build a future together. Sophie could hardly believe the words had remained hidden for so long. She searched for Lucas online and discovered he still lived nearby. A week later they met for coffee, laughed about the forgotten letter, and wondered how different their lives might have been. Sometimes a story begins years after it was first written.
